name: New Horizon Aircraft Ltd. Class A Ordinary Share
summary: New Horizon Aircraft Ltd. focuses on the design and development of a Cavorite X5, a hybrid electric Vertical Take-off and Landing (VTOL) aircraft. The Cavorite X5 is designed to fly most of its mission as a conventional aircraft, offering longer range and better fuel efficiency compared to traditional VTOL aircraft. New Horizon Aircraft is headquartered in Mississauga, Ontario, Canada.
